verses.1: Hal ata AAala alinsani heenun mina alddahri lam yakun shayan mathkooran
verses.2: Inna khalaqna alinsana min nutfatin amshajin nabtaleehi fajaAAalnahu sameeAAan baseeran
verses.3: Inna hadaynahu alssabeela imma shakiran waimma kafooran
verses.4: Inna aAAtadna lilkafireena salasila waaghlalan wasaAAeeran
verses.5: Inna alabrara yashraboona min kasin kana mizajuha kafooran
verses.6: AAaynan yashrabu biha AAibadu Allahi yufajjiroonaha tafjeeran
verses.7: Yoofoona bialnnathri wayakhafoona yawman kana sharruhu mustateeran
verses.8: WayutAAimona alttaAAama AAala hubbihi miskeenan wayateeman waaseeran
verses.9: Innama nutAAimukum liwajhi Allahi la nureedu minkum jazaan wala shukooran
verses.10: Inna nakhafu min rabbina yawman AAaboosan qamtareeran
verses.11: Fawaqahumu Allahu sharra thalika alyawmi walaqqahum nadratan wasurooran
verses.13: Muttakieena feeha AAala alaraiki la yarawna feeha shamsan wala zamhareeran
verses.14: Wadaniyatan AAalayhim thilaluha wathullilat qutoofuha tathleelan
verses.15: Wayutafu AAalayhim bianiyatin min fiddatin waakwabin kanat qawareera
verses.17: Wayusqawna feeha kasan kana mizajuha zanjabeelan
verses.19: Wayatoofu AAalayhim wildanun mukhalladoona itha raaytahum hasibtahum luluan manthooran
verses.20: Waitha raayta thamma raayta naAAeeman wamulkan kabeeran
verses.21: AAaliyahum thiyabu sundusin khudrun waistabraqun wahulloo asawira min fiddatin wasaqahum rabbuhum sharaban tahooran
verses.22: Inna hatha kana lakum jazaan wakana saAAyukum mashkooran
verses.23: Inna nahnu nazzalna AAalayka alqurana tanzeelan
verses.24: Faisbir lihukmi rabbika wala tutiAA minhum athiman aw kafooran
verses.26: Wamina allayli faosjud lahu wasabbihhu laylan taweelan
verses.27: Inna haolai yuhibboona alAAajilata wayatharoona waraahum yawman thaqeelan
verses.28: Nahnu khalaqnahum washadadna asrahum waitha shina baddalna amthalahum tabdeelan
verses.29: Inna hathihi tathkiratun faman shaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi sabeelan
verses.30: Wama tashaoona illa an yashaa Allahu inna Allaha kana AAaleeman hakeeman
verses.31: Yudkhilu man yashao fee rahmatihi waalththalimeena aAAadda lahum AAathaban aleeman
